notes: HAR-698/HAR-777 executable parity coverage for validationCreate defaults, active-validation cap, Function API-type rejection, and validation-owned metafield persistence. The mutation aliases preserve the ticket-required legs ValidationCreateMinimal, ValidationCreateMaxActive, ValidationCreateApiMismatch, and ValidationCreateWithMetafields, while operationNames uses registry root names required by conformance discovery. The local-runtime cassette hydrates a VALIDATION Function and a CART_TRANSFORM Function without runtime Shopify writes; strict comparison covers the mutation payloads and a downstream validations connection read.
